reviews.author: Mizuki Tasku
reviews.content: I really dislike how Bilibili keeps changing its app icon to include promotional banners like “League of Legends Season 19.” The app icon is supposed to be a consistent, recognisable entry point — not an advertising space on my home screen. It feels intrusive and disrespectful to users who want a clean and stable interface. Please follow proper design principles and stop using the icon as a billboard.
reviews.title: Please stop turning the app icon into an ad
